en: If your company is required to comply with Nicaraguan Social Security requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Nicaragua Social Security INSS Applicability Assessment
In Nicaragua, companies must comply with the General Regulations of the INSS, as reformed by Decreto No. 975 and upheld by the Nicaraguan Social Security Institute (INSS).

Is your company required to comply with Nicaraguan Social Security requirements as regulated by the Nicaraguan Social Security Institute (INSS) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Nicaraguan Social Security requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company does not have any employees in Nicaragua.
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Nicaraguan legislation.
